title: PS25/1: Strengthening protections for borrowers in financial difficulty
summary: Final rules requiring lenders to take additional steps when borrowers show signs of financial difficulty.
gold_rationale: Consumer credit lender rules; outside Airwallex's payment institution / EMI scope.

title: Safeguarding requirements for payments and e-money firms - PS24/3
summary: Final rules on segregation, reconciliation, and reporting for safeguarded customer funds at PIs and EMIs.
gold_rationale: Direct touch on UK-EMI safeguarding obligations; mandatory.

title: Notice PSN02 amendment: technology risk management for major payment institutions
summary: Amended notice tightening incident reporting timelines and outsourcing controls.
gold_rationale: Direct rule change for SG-MPI holders.

title: Geographic Targeting Order: Southwest border money services businesses
summary: Renewed GTO requiring CTRs at $200 threshold for designated counties.
gold_rationale: MSB reporting obligation in defined geographies; affects US-MSB compliance program.

title: Sanctions update: 14 entities added to SDN list (Russia-related)
summary: New SDN entries; secondary sanctions risk for non-US institutions.
gold_rationale: Screening obligation across all jurisdictions; multi-licence touch.

title: Speech: Chair on building trust in financial services
summary: Speech delivered at industry conference; no rule change.
gold_rationale: Speech, not policy. No operational change.

title: Stablecoin Issuer Ordinance: commencement date
summary: New regime for fiat-referenced stablecoins commences 1 August 2025; licensing window opens.
gold_rationale: Authorisation perimeter change in HK; affects whether HK-MSO covers stablecoin activity.

title: Guidelines on PSD2 strong customer authentication exemptions - update
summary: Refined guidance on transaction risk analysis exemption thresholds.
gold_rationale: EU-EMI passporting; SCA rules apply directly.

title: Discussion paper: regulatory regime for systemic stablecoins
gold_rationale: Consultation/discussion only, no rule change. Note in next quarterly review.

title: Virtual Currency Guidance: customer protection enhancements
summary: Updated guidance for BitLicense holders on segregation of customer crypto.
gold_rationale: Airwallex does not currently hold BitLicense; flag only if/when scope expands.

title: Updated guidance on cross-border movement of monetary instruments
summary: Enhanced reporting expectations for IFTI submissions.
gold_rationale: Direct AML reporting touch on AU-AUSTRAC remittance registration.

title: Consultation: APP fraud reimbursement extension to credit transfers from EMIs
summary: Consultation on whether the APP fraud reimbursement regime should cover EMI-originated payments.
gold_rationale: Even though consultation, scope explicitly proposes UK-EMI coverage; warrants response.

title: Personnel announcement: appointment of new Deputy Managing Director
Final rule: beneficial ownership reporting clarifications
summary: Clarifies reporting timelines for changes in beneficial ownership at MSBs.
gold_rationale: Affects US-MSB compliance program; reporting timeline change.

title: Updated AFSL conditions: foreign exchange dealing
summary: Tightened conduct expectations for AFSL holders dealing in FX.
gold_rationale: AU-AFSL conduct rules update; direct touch.
